---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is this important?

> Example: "I often need to compare schemas across environments but have to do it manually..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision the feature working. Include mockups or examples if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other approaches that could address the problem?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that support the request.
